title: Field
description: A field definition within a content type schema.

uid.description: Unique identifier of the field within the content type.

data_type.description: The data type of the field. Common values: text, number, boolean, date, file, link, json, reference, global_field, group, blocks.

mandatory.description: Indicates whether the field is required for entry creation.

unique.description: Indicates whether field values must be unique across entries.
